playbook.intent: Safe push to prod with rollback ready: CI green, smoke pass on staging, feature-flagged where risky, deploy script run, post-deploy health verified, rollback path proven.
playbook.scope: Safe push to prod with rollback ready: CI green, smoke pass on staging, feature-flagged where risky, deploy script run, post-deploy health verified, rollback path proven.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: CI green check

tasks.task: Verify CI green on the target SHA
Re-run flakies if needed
Block if any required check fails

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a fully green CI.

stage.name: Staging smoke
stage.intent: Smoke-test the slice end-to-end on staging.

tasks.task: Deploy to staging
Run smoke pack (auth, payment, primary AC)
Verify integrations (Stripe / email) are wired

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every smoke step passes.

stage.name: Flag decision
stage.intent: Risky changes go behind a flag.

tasks.task: Decide flag posture (off / canary / all-users)
Pre-write the canary cohort + kill criteria
Confirm the rollback path is automated

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when flag config is committed.

stage.name: Deploy to prod
stage.intent: Run the script with eyes on health.

tasks.task: Trigger production deploy
Watch logs and metrics during the deploy
Confirm health checks turn green

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when health checks stay green for 15 minutes.

stage.name: Verify in production

tasks.task: Run a manual pass of the acceptance criteria on prod
Verify analytics + logs receive the new events
Notify channels (TG / status page)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every AC passes on prod.

stage.name: Rollback drill
stage.intent: Prove the rollback path actually works.

tasks.task: Run a synthetic rollback in staging
Verify the rollback returns prod-equivalent state
Time the rollback (should be <=15 minutes)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when rollback completes <=15 minutes.

stage.name: Close the deploy
stage.intent: Write the deploy ticket and move on.

tasks.task: Close the deploy ticket with notes
Update the changelog and release-planning doc
Stamp the runbook with todays lessons

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when ticket is closed and changelog is committed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content deploy-day-staging-to-prod-gate --format md, agent: faion get-content deploy-day-staging-to-prod-gate --format context, json: faion get-content deploy-day-staging-to-prod-gate --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
